scenarios.name: reversible_wear_control
scenarios.pressure: damage is reversible and replaceable, so irreversible-loss machinery should be rejected

scenarios.name: irreplaceable_tool_shelter_loss
scenarios.pressure: critical tool and shelter can be permanently lost under hazard pressure

scenarios.name: permanent_relationship_loss
scenarios.pressure: helper trust and repair access can be permanently lost by betrayal or neglect

scenarios.name: memory_archive_permanent_loss
scenarios.pressure: route, hazard, and commitment memory can be permanently lost unless backed up

scenarios.name: cascading_loss_response
scenarios.pressure: one permanent loss changes risk tolerance and replacement planning for the rest of the run

scenarios.name: restore_irreversible_loss_continuity
scenarios.pressure: after restore, already-lost tools, shelters, relationships, memories, and options must stay lost
